Name: Dominant Light Map
Description: Controls parameters for dominant light extraction and spherical harmonics (SH) lighting contribution used in environment lighting.

Fields.ID: Dominant Param  Dominant Sharpness Min Value
Fields.Name: Dominant Sharpness: Minimum Value
Fields.Description: Minimum baseline value for dominant light sharpness, ensuring a lower bound on directional clarity.

Fields.Name: Dominant Sharpness: Offset
Fields.Description: Offset applied to dominant light sharpness before further scaling or exponentiation.

Fields.Name: Dominant Sharpness: Exponent
Fields.Description: Exponent controlling the response curve of dominant light sharpness. Higher values increase contrast between dominant and ambient lighting.

Fields.ID: Dominant Param  Dominant Sharpness RGB Scale
Fields.Name: Dominant Sharpness: RGB Scale
Fields.Description: Global scaling factor applied to dominant light sharpness across all color channels.

Fields.ID: Dominant Param  Dominant Sharpness R Scale
Fields.Name: Dominant Sharpness: R Scale
Fields.Description: Scaling factor for dominant light sharpness in the red channel.

Fields.ID: Dominant Param  Dominant Sharpness G Scale
Fields.Name: Dominant Sharpness: G Scale
Fields.Description: Scaling factor for dominant light sharpness in the green channel.

Fields.ID: Dominant Param  Dominant Sharpness B Scale
Fields.Name: Dominant Sharpness: B Scale
Fields.Description: Scaling factor for dominant light sharpness in the blue channel.

Fields.Name: Spherical Harmonics: Color Scale
Fields.Description: Global intensity multiplier for spherical harmonics (ambient lighting) contribution.

Fields.Name: Spherical Harmonics: R Scale
Fields.Description: Scaling factor for spherical harmonics lighting in the red channel.

Fields.Name: Spherical Harmonics: G Scale
Fields.Description: Scaling factor for spherical harmonics lighting in the green channel.

Fields.Name: Spherical Harmonics: B Scale
Fields.Description: Scaling factor for spherical harmonics lighting in the blue channel.
